message:
refactor(mcp): replace wildcard import of mcp_types with explicit imports

Replace #[allow(clippy::wildcard_imports)] use mcp_types::* with two
targeted import blocks:

- Runtime imports: CapabilityResolution, IpcPaneState, McpEnvelope,
  McpReservationInfo, now_ms (always needed)
- Test-only imports (#[cfg(test)]): 30+ types/functions used exclusively
  in the test module — EventsParams, SearchParams, MCP_VERSION,
  apply_tail_truncation, default_* helpers, etc.

This completes the wildcard import elimination across the MCP module
family (mcp.rs, mcp_helpers.rs, mcp_missions.rs, mcp_types.rs,
mcp_middleware.rs, mcp_resources.rs).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
